text:
NAME: LINE_MDCR_COINSRNC_PD_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76); may be negative. 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: Dollar amounts in this field represent payments made either by the state or their fiscal agent to 
providers, managed care plans, and beneficiaries or they represent payments made by managed care 
plans to their providers. Refer to the
